sources.title: Wise Girls (1929)
sources.description: I've been researching newly public domain films from 1929 and earlier, so I'm uploading the best possible copies that I can find. This comedy follows a plumber aspiring to be an architect who is convinced into becoming engaged to a rich girl so she can attract the jealousy of another man. Wise Girls' story might sound a little convoluted, but for an early sound film it has a longer runtime to pad out and make sense of the plot.

sources.title: Wise Girls (MGM, 1929) ROLAND YOUNG 🍕CLASSIC COMEDY
sources.description:
PizzaFLIX Presents CLASSIC MOVIE MONDAY
Stars: Roland Young, Norma Lee, Elliott Nugent
Director: Mason Hopper

Step back into the golden age of early sound cinema with this rare classic comedy, adapted from the Broadway hit Kempy by father-and-son writing team J.C. and Elliott Nugent. Both Nugents reprise their stage roles, joined by Norma Lee, Elliott’s real-life wife, making this film a true family affair. Also featured is the inimitable Roland Young, whose witty presence and dry delivery add a memorable spark to the ensemble.

Are you a PizzaFLIX Fanatic? Join our exclusive Fan Club for dedicated Classic movie lovers: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE34fwgW7kWr7tc7YiOWtRw/join

Set in a domestic whirlwind of misunderstandings and sharp dialogue, the film blends family dynamics with the fast-talking charm typical of pre-Code Hollywood. Though less known today, its historical value and theatrical roots make it a fascinating artifact of early MGM sound productions.

🍕Subscribe to PizzaFLIX for more timeless gems from the Golden Age of Hollywood! Don’t forget to like, comment, and share if you love vintage cinema.🍕

#WiseGirls1929 #PreCodeHollywood #MGMClassics #VintageCinema #BroadwayToHollywood #RolandYoung #ClassicComedy #1920sMovies #OldHollywood #FilmHistory #ClassicMovieMonday #PizzaFLIX

metadata.Plot: The father of three grown daughters tries to keep his sanity, even after his free-spirited middle daughter rebelliously marries a poor plumber.
metadata.Writer: J.C. Nugent, Elliott Nugent, Margaret Booth
metadata.Actors: Elliott Nugent, Norma Lee, Roland Young
